content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be restructured as a self-reinforcing "memory curiosity loop" for 2025 autonomous self-supervised agents, where unlabeled memory gaps act as the intrinsic reward signal that drives active self-supervised data collection. This loop eliminates the need for external reward annotation or pre-specified query sets by tying memory growth directly to the agent's ongoing self-supervised representation learning.
